tools.Name: Fish Speech
tools.Description: A high-quality, open-source Text-to-Speech system supporting over 50 languages with expressive voice cloning capabilities.
tools.Use_Case: Creating realistic, emotionally rich speech and voice cloning for applications or content creation.

tools.Name: Hindsight
tools.Description: An agent memory system that moves beyond simple recall, enabling agents to learn, reflect, and store mental models of their environment.
tools.Use_Case: Powering AI agents that require long-term retention, reflection, and personalization for complex task automation.

tools.Name: AstrBot
tools.Description: An open-source, all-in-one agent platform that integrates AI agents with major instant messaging platforms like Telegram, Slack, and Discord.
tools.Use_Case: Building and deploying production-ready AI agents into existing social or corporate messaging workflows.
